metadata.title: FateMap — AI Geopolitical Prediction Sandbox
metadata.description: Input any event. Watch the world react.

landing.tagline: Input any event. Watch the world react.
landing.ctaDescription: Explore 28 preset geopolitical scenarios — no API key required.
landing.feature1Desc: Military, trade, energy, climate, health, political, economic, and technology scenarios ready to simulate.
landing.feature2Desc: Bring your own API key for custom scenario analysis with DeepSeek, Gemini, OpenAI, or Anthropic.
landing.feature3Desc: Shockwave ripples, network glow lines, country fills, and city markers animate global impact.
landing.feature4Desc: Trade, military, energy, supply chain, political, and geographic relationships between 48 countries.
landing.feature5Desc: Full English and Chinese support for all scenarios, impacts, and UI elements.
landing.feature6Desc: Built with Next.js, deck.gl, and MapLibre. No API keys needed for preset scenarios.

settings.title: API Key Settings
settings.description: Configure your LLM provider to enable custom scenario analysis. Your API key is stored locally in your browser.
